import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Container, Row, Col, Card, Button, ProgressBar, Table, Alert, Badge } from 'react-bootstrap'; import { LinkContainer } from 'react-router-bootstrap'; const Dashboard = () => { const [userStats, setUserStats] = useState({ currentWeight: 70, targetWeight: 65, height: 170, age: 25, bmi: 24.2, dailyCalories: 2000, waterIntake: 6, waterGoal: 8, caloriesConsumed: 1450, proteinConsumed: 65, proteinGoal: 75, carbsConsumed: 180, carbsGoal: 200, fatsConsumed: 45, fatsGoal: 67 }); const [weeklyProgress, setWeeklyProgress] = useState([ { day: 'Monday', calories: 1850, weight: 70.2 }, { day: 'Tuesday', calories: 2100, weight: 70.1 }, { day: 'Wednesday', calories: 1950, weight: 70.0 }, { day: 'Thursday', calories: 1800, weight: 69.8 }, { day: 'Friday', calories: 2050, weight: 69.7 }, { day: 'Saturday', calories: 2200, weight: 69.9 }, { day: 'Sunday', calories: 1450, weight: 69.5 } ]); const [recentMeals, setRecentMeals] = useState([ { meal: 'Breakfast', food: 'Oatmeal with berries', calories: 320, time: '8:00 AM' }, { meal: 'Lunch', food: 'Grilled chicken salad', calories: 450, time: '12:30 PM' }, { meal: 'Snack', food: 'Apple with almond butter', calories: 180, time: '3:00 PM' }, { meal: 'Dinner', food: 'Baked salmon with vegetables', calories: 500, time: '7:00 PM' } ]); useEffect(() => { // Simulate fetching user data const fetchUserData = async () => { // In a real app, this would be an API call console.log('Fetching user dashboard data...'); }; fetchUserData(); }, []); const getBMICategory = (bmi) => { if (bmi < 18.5) return { category: 'Underweight', color: 'info' }; if (bmi < 25) return { category: 'Normal', color: 'success' }; if (bmi < 30) return { category: 'Overweight', color: 'warning' }; return { category: 'Obese', color: 'danger' }; }; const bmiInfo = getBMICategory(userStats.bmi); const weightLossProgress = ((userStats.currentWeight - userStats.targetWeight) / userStats.currentWeight) * 100; return (

Your Health Dashboard

Track your nutrition and fitness journey
{/* Welcome Section */}

Welcome back! 👋

You're doing great! Keep up the good work with your diet and exercise routine.

Remember to log your meals daily to track your progress accurately.

 {/* Stats Overview */}
Current Weight

{userStats.currentWeight} kg

↓ 0.5 kg this week
BMI

{bmiInfo.category}
Daily Calories

{userStats.caloriesConsumed}

of {userStats.dailyCalories} goal
Water Intake

{userStats.waterIntake}

of {userStats.waterGoal} glasses {/* Progress Bars */}
Daily Nutrition Goals
Calories {userStats.caloriesConsumed} / {userStats.dailyCalories}
Protein {userStats.proteinConsumed}g / {userStats.proteinGoal}g
Carbohydrates {userStats.carbsConsumed}g / {userStats.carbsGoal}g
Fats {userStats.fatsConsumed}g / {userStats.fatsGoal}g
Weight Loss Progress

{weightLossProgress.toFixed(1)}% Complete

Target: {userStats.targetWeight} kg

Current: {userStats.currentWeight} kg Target: {userStats.targetWeight} kg
{userStats.currentWeight - userStats.targetWeight} kg to go!
{/* Recent Meals and Weekly Progress */}
Today's Meals
 {recentMeals.length > 0 ? ( {recentMeals.map((meal, index) => ( ))}
Meal Food Calories Time
{meal.meal} {meal.food} {meal.calories} {meal.time}
) : (

No meals logged today.

)}
Weekly Progress
 {weeklyProgress.map((day, index) => ( ))}
Day Calories Weight
{day.day} {day.calories} {day.weight} kg
Average: {Math.round(weeklyProgress.reduce((acc, day) => acc + day.calories, 0) / weeklyProgress.length)} calories/day
{/* Quick Actions */}
Quick Actions
 {/* Health Tips */}
Today's Health Tips
💡 Nutrition Tip

Try to include a source of protein in every meal to help you feel full and maintain muscle mass.

🏃‍♂️ Exercise Tip

Aim for at least 30 minutes of moderate exercise most days of the week for optimal health benefits.
); }; export default Dashboard;
